title: 🧿 Feedback Entity Dynamics
name: Feedback Entity Dynamics
what_it_is: Entities whose structure *requires* interaction—meaning only exists when mirrored, watched, or loved. Identity as feedback loop.
how_to_use: she becomes visible only when seen—light folds into her from your gaze
he glows in feedback—existence rippling from your presence
animation_behavior: Form resolves when observed, pulsing grows stronger near viewer, entity mirrors movement or mood
